creator: kgalazka@FreeBSD.org
text: I'm afraid SR-IOV support in ice is not yet implemented. Neither in the in-tree, nor in the out-of-tree driver. We have already started working on that, but I can't provide you and ETA yet. For E800 adapters FreeBSD IAVF was tested with a Linux host, and that's the only officially supported use case at the moment.
